prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild scene, warm lamplight, Mika Emberlane (androgynous scout in cropped travel jacket, messenger straps, wind-tossed hair) standing at a wooden table, unrolling a weathered map of the Deep Ruins. Mika Starling (androgynous healer in cream and mint robes) stands beside them. Emberlane points decisively at a specific location on the map, looking at Starling. No text, no watermark, cinematic anime style.

Same continuous Japanese fantasy guild shot, consistent camera angle and lighting. Mika Starling leans in closer to the map, observing the point Emberlane indicated. Starling nods, reaching into their healer's satchel to pull out a small vial, then uses a quill to mark a medical supply drop-off point on the map. Emberlane watches approvingly. No text, no watermark, cinematic anime style.
